conditions.label: Anesthesia
conditions.description: General anesthesia — K-input to consciousness = 0. No novel information processed. Conscious model offline.
conditions.known_psychophysics: Patients uniformly report zero time passage. 'It felt instantaneous.' No subjective duration.
conditions.reference: Alkire et al. (2008) Anesthesiology; Koch & Greenfield (2007)

conditions.label: Watching paint dry
conditions.description: Monotone, unchanging scene. Retinal input is nearly stationary. Almost no new K enters conscious processing. Boredom maximum.
conditions.known_psychophysics: Strong subjective time dilation. Boredom slows perceived time. 1 min feels like 5-10 min in high-boredom conditions.

conditions.label: Meditation (focused attention)
conditions.description: Focused attention on breath: moderate K-inflow from interoception and meta-awareness. Reduces external K-input but maintains internal K-monitoring. Novelty is attenuated but not zero.
conditions.known_psychophysics: Meditators report expanded present moment, slowed subjective time. 'Each breath feels longer.' Duration estimates are longer than clock time for the same interval.
conditions.reference: Wittmann et al. (2015) Front. Psychol.; Berkovich-Ohana et al. (2011)

conditions.label: Watching an action movie
conditions.description: High scene-cut rate (~2s cuts), novel visual content, narrative tension. K-inflow is above baseline but not maximal: content is processed but structured (not purely novel).
conditions.known_psychophysics: Mild 'time flies' effect in retrospect. Duration underestimated prospectively when attention is engaged. 2hr film feels shorter.
conditions.reference: Block et al. (2010) Psychol. Res.; Tse et al. (2004) Science

conditions.label: Flow state
conditions.description: Peak engagement — skilled task at optimal challenge/skill ratio. K-inflow is maximal: every moment brings new task-relevant information. Full conscious bandwidth saturated with structured novel input.
conditions.known_psychophysics: Strongest 'time flies' effect. Hours pass unnoticed. Csikszentmihalyi: flow is defined partly by altered time perception. Duration underestimation: 4h feels like 1h.

genomes.note: Simplest self-replicating entity. ~20 Kbits functional K.
Prokaryote with dense genome. ~8.1 Mbits functional K.
First eukaryote. Introns appear; functional fraction drops. ~16.8 Mbits.
~3 Gbp genome but only 1.5% coding = 45 Mbits protein-coding K.
Including regulatory elements (~3× coding): ~135 Mbits functional K.

section3_timescale_hierarchy.source: quantum_K_change.py — S/K distinction: S runs at ~1e14 Hz, K at decoherence rate
Standard chemical kinetics; transition state ~1 ps
landauer_change.py — Kramers rate; brain_k_flow.py ion channel section
brain_k_flow.py finding 4: revised rate ~2-10 Hz to stay within energy budget
brain_k_flow.py — conscious bandwidth 50 bits/s; specious present 3s
Fossil record — average species lifespan ~1-10 Myr
Cosmological K: Bekenstein entropy of Hubble volume ~10^122 bits; structure forms over Gyr
